title: Full Product Catalog
description: Complete listing of 95 products across 16 categories.

products.name: ACE-BoxIPC-C4L3
features: Support 1 x 8-bit DIO via the DB-9 port
Support Wall Mounting (Optional VESA, DIN Rail)

products.name: ACE-Sever-2U-Xeon-E5-F
features: Support Intel Xeon E5 Series Processor (Dual Socket )
Support 4 x Gigabit LAN Ports (Network Redundancy)
Flexible PCIe expansion slots for Add-on cards

products.name: ACE-Sever-4U-Xeon-E5-F
features: Support Intel Xeon E5 Series High-performance Processor
Support High-capacity System Memory (Large Database optimized)
Support Massive Storage Bay for Enterprise HDD
Support GPU Acceleration for AI and Data analysis
Redundant Power Supply for 24/7 Mission-critical stability

products.name: VME
features: VME: Winning over the long term
Launched in 1981, the large majority of open architecture rugged systems around the world today are based on the VME architecture

products.name: VPX 3U
features: In 2006, launched the SBC340, the industry's first 3U VPX single board computer
Solutions in all shapes and sizes for any systems architecture, form factor, and interface requirements

products.name: VPX 6U
features: Key members of Abaco's HPEC solution include the SWE540 fully managed 6U VPX 40/10GigE Data Plane Ethernet switch (NETernity SWE540), Layer 2/3 managed switching and routing

products.name: CompactPCI
features: Now into its third decade, CompactPCI still makes it possible to leverage Intel Core i7 and NXP QorIQ processor technology in proven rugged form factors

products.name: PMC
features: Abaco Systems has expertise in military, commercial and telecommunications markets
In-depth understanding of application requirements and communication protocols

products.name: XMC
features: Abaco's range of high performance XMCs supports demanding networking, I/O and processing needs of advanced applications

products.name: FMC/FMC+
features: Perhaps the industry's broadest range of mezzanines to take advantage of FPGA technology power and flexibility

products.name: HIMA HiMax System
features: HiMax is a range of flexible COTS control system for safety-critical rail industry applications with high performance requirements

products.name: HIMA HiMatrix System
features: HIMatrix is a range of versatile COTS controllers for small to mid-scale safety-critical rail applications
Pre-certified CENELEC SIL 4, compact, vibration/shock resistant

products.name: 1U 5500/5600-Series Server
features: 1U NEBS-compliant server with Intel 5500 series Server Board, two Intel Xeon quad-core processors, 550W AC/DC or dual 750W power supplies

products.name: Expansion Optimized Server
features: 2U server revolutionizing homogenous systems with closely coupled processors, solid-state storage and accelerator co-processing (GPGPUs, Intel Xeon Phi, FPGAs)

products.name: 3U 5000 Series Server
features: OSS offers custom server configurations for rackmount, specialized, military rugged, high density, and HPC variations
Optimized for PCIe over Cable Expansion

products.name: FlashCUBE
features: CUBE desktop enclosure supports one double-wide or two single-wide full-height I/O cards up to 13.25 inch long
Includes PCIe cable adapter/cable or Thunderbolt cable and 180W power supply

products.name: Flash-µCUBE
features: uCUBE desktop enclosure supports one full-height I/O card up to 9.55 inch long
Includes PCIe cable adapter/cable and 84W external power supply

products.name: GPU CUBE
features: CUBE desktop enclosure supports one double-wide or two single-wide full-height I/O cards up to 13.25 inch long with PCIe cable adapter/cable or Thunderbolt cable and 180W power supply

products.name: Wind River VxWorks 6.9
features: VxWorks is the industry's leading commercial RTOS, matching applications with hardware performance and reliability for secure, intelligent, connected devices

products.name: Wind River Workbench 3.2
features: Wind River Workbench is a full commercial development suite for embedded device software development

products.name: WIND RIVER LINUX
features: Wind River Linux is the embedded Linux solution reducing risk and time-to-market for Linux-based devices with commercial-tested Yocto Project Linux content

products.name: WIND RIVER PULSAR LINUX
features: Wind River Pulsar Linux is a container-based OS delivering bug fixes and security vulnerability fixes to protect deployed devices and mitigate costs

products.name: VxWorks 653 Platform
features: Wind River VxWorks 653 Platform is a safe, secure, reliable RTOS fully compliant with ARINC Spec 653, providing robust partitioning for IMA and ARINC compliance

products.name: ISaGRAF
features: ISaGRAF is the reference and de facto standard in automation software technology, designed to bridge microcomputer systems and PLCs

products.name: SE-Workbench-EO
features: SE-Workbench-EO has been designed for the creation of synthetic models of complex environments that have to be as realistic as possible in order to stimulate systems using sensors in the EO domain

products.name: SE-Workbench-HWIL-EO
features: SE-FAST-HWIL is the real time image generator package designed to deliver high realistic infrared (IR) images at very high frame rates (200Hz and above) in a closed loop mode

products.name: SE-Workbench-EOS
features: Target signature rendering in Electro-Optics domain
Tools and data included in SE-WORKBENCH-EOS dedicated to aircraft signature computation in the EO domain

products.name: SE-FAST-IG
features: SE-FAST-IG is a high performance visualisation application
Driven by users' simulators through its CIGI interface, supports features for flight training, driving simulations, ground warfare

products.name: SE-Workbench-RF
features: The aim of SE-Workbench-RF is to create synthetic models of complex environments for simulating systems with EM sources and sensors, typically radar systems

products.name: SE-Workbench-SAR
features: SE-Workbench-SAR allows computing SAR data with advanced OKTAL-SE software
SAR raw data computed using ray-tracing combined with asymptotic methods (GO, PO and ECM)

products.name: SE-Workbench-RBGM
features: SE-RAY-RADAR is dedicated to RBGM computing (Real Beam Ground Mapping) of complex 3D scenes
Simulates radar frequency, scanning parameters, trajectory embedding, visualization modes

products.name: SE-Workbench-AEO
features: SE-RAY-AEO: Pulsed LASER context, specular predominant cover
Simulation of range gating capacities and detection/identification of metallic or dielectric targets

products.name: SE-Workbench-GNSS
features: SE-NAV is a propagation simulator for assessment of signals reception in stringent environments
Predicts performance of GPS, GALILEO, BEIDOU or pseudolites in 3D virtual scenes

products.name: SE-AGETIM
features: SE-AGETIM is an integrated software tools suite enabling 3D environment generation for simulation
Dedicated to GIS experts, enables full integration

products.name: SE-AGETIM-LIGHT
features: SE-AGETIM-LIGHT is a simple standalone software enabling easy 3D environment generation for sensor simulation with integration of various geographical data sources

products.name: SE-AGETIM-BUILDING
features: SE-AGETIM-BUILDING is dedicated to editing building templates and handling extrusion of buildings from templates in SE-AGETIM

products.name: SE-AGETIM-INDOOR
features: SE-AGETIM-INDOOR is dedicated to editing building plans including furniture, lighting and decoration objects, with automatic extrusion of interior structures

products.name: SE-TK FORM Suite
features: SE-Workbench Special Tool-Kits (TK) for expert users
Divided in 2 families of APIs: refined preparation of scenarios and dynamic modification

products.name: SE-TK D SCNX Suite
features: SE-TK-D-SCNX enhances SE-TOOLKIT functions for making changes during scenario rendering in closed loop mode

products.name: Connext DDS Professional
features: RTI Connext DDS Professional is the first connectivity software for Industrial Internet of Things (IIoT)
Delivers low-latency, high reliability, scalability and security for mission-critical systems

products.name: RTI Connext DDS Secure
features: RTI Connext DDS Secure enables IIoT architects to build secure and scalable systems of systems with fine-grained security on Connext Databus

products.name: RTI Connext DDS Micro
features: Connext DDS Micro for distributed IIoT systems meeting stringent Size, Weight and Power (SWaP) requirements

products.name: RTI Connext DDS Cert
features: RTI Connext DDS Cert enables IIoT architects to build safety-critical systems
Only off-the-shelf connectivity framework certifiable for highest safety standards

products.name: SPx Server (Target Tracking)
features: SPx Server is a multi-function radar processor providing radar distribution, plot extraction and target tracking

products.name: RadarView (Visualization)
features: RadarView is Cambridge Pixel's Windows-based application for capture and visualization of primary radar video from remote server, network interface, or HPx capture card

products.name: SPx Radar Simulator
features: SPx Radar Simulator is a Windows-based application generating simulated radar video data over network socket, with terrain elevation data for realistic radar returns

products.name: SPx Development
features: Cambridge Pixel's SPx Development software for developers incorporating radar processing or display capabilities

products.name: SPx Fusion Server
features: SPx Fusion fuses observations from multiple independent sensors into a single stream of correlated reports

products.name: RDR Data Recorder
features: Cambridge Pixel's RDR provides full-featured, multichannel record and replay for radar video, target tracks, AIS, ADS-B, IFF and navigation data simultaneously

products.name: VSD (Video Security Display)
features: VSD application interfaces to radars and cameras providing a readymade situational awareness display

products.name: ASD-100
features: ASD-100 is Cambridge Pixel's PC-based air surveillance display for primary and secondary radar data

products.name: SPx-Scan
features: SPx-Scan software-based radar scan converter for Windows and Linux/X11, simplifying radar integration into graphics applications

products.name: SPx Radar Image Distribution
features: SPx Radar Image Server (RIS) is a scan conversion server that captures and scan converts radar video into images delivered to clients or web browsers

products.name: SPx AIS
features: SPx AV is Cambridge Pixel's audio and video streaming software for compression, distribution and recording from multiple sources

products.name: HPx-346
features: HPx-346 is a small form factor combined analogue radar input and network distribution card

products.name: HPx-400e
features: HPx-400e is a high-performance PCIe dual-stream radar acquisition card capturing analogue and digital primary radar video from up to two radars

products.name: HPx-300
features: HPx-300 Radar Signal Output card generates representative radar signals for testing, simulation, training or streaming

products.name: HPx-250
features: HPx-250 is a high-performance PMC-based radar acquisition card capturing one or two analogue and up to 2 bits of digital primary radar video

products.name: HPx-200
features: HPx-200 is a high-performance PCI-based radar acquisition card capturing one or two analogue or up to 8 bits of digital primary radar video

products.name: WIND RIVER HELIX DEVICE CLOUD
features: Wind River Helix Device Cloud is an IoT device management platform reducing complexities of large-scale deployments with health monitoring and remote access

products.name: TITANIUM CONTROL
features: Wind River Titanium Control: on-premise cloud infrastructure for critical services, improving agility and reducing operating/deployment costs

products.name: Wind River Simics
features: Simics simulates systems from smallest to most complex
Moving from physical hardware to virtual lab lets embedded software teams revolutionize development processes

products.name: MXH532 PCIe 5.0 x16 Transparent Adapter
features: 성능 및 규격: PCIe Gen5(32 GT/s) 지원 및 하위 버전(1.0~5.0) 완벽 호환, 초저지연 성능(칩 100ns / 앱 간 600ns)
연결성: Quad SFF-8614 x4 커넥터 및 패시브 구리 케이블 지원
하드웨어 설계: Microchip Switchtec® Gen 5.0 PFX 탑재, LP-HL(Low Profile, Half Length) 폼팩터, 상태 표시 LED
주요 기능: RDMA(PIO/DMA) 지원, 클럭 격리 및 CFC/SSC 자동 지원, 멀티 설정을 위한 EEPROM 내장

products.name: MXH930 PCIe NTB Adapter
features: 성능 및 인터페이스: PCIe Gen4(16 GT/s) 지원 및 하위 호환(Gen1~4), Microchip PM40036-PFX 칩셋 탑재, 100ns 미만의 초저지연(Cut-Through) 성능
연결성 및 케이블: Quad SFF-8644 커넥터 사용, 구리(Copper) 및 광(Fiber-optic) 케이블 지원, CMI 및 non-CMI 케이블 호환
유연한 포트 구성: 1개(x16), 2개(x8), 4개(x4) 등 다양한 포트 구성 옵션 제공
클러스터링 및 확장성: 2~5 노드 클러스터 구성 지원, MXS924와 결합 시 최대 64~128 노드까지 확장 가능
주요 기능: RDMA(PIO 및 DMA*) 지원, Full Host Clock Isolation 및 CFC/SSC 자동 지원, 커스텀 설정을 위한 EEPROM 내장 (*DMA는 개발 중)
하드웨어 설계: LP(Low Profile) 폼팩터, 전면부 링크 상태 LED 탑재

products.name: MXH932 PCIe Transparent Adapter
features: 인터페이스 및 성능: PCIe Gen4(16 GT/s) 지원 및 하위 호환(Gen1~4), 100ns 미만의 초저지연(Cut-Through) 성능, Microchip PM40036-PFX 칩셋 탑재
연결성 및 케이블: Quad SFF-8644 커넥터 기반, 구리(Copper) 및 광(Fiber-optic) 케이블 지원, CMI 지원 PCIe 4.0 케이블 호환
유연한 포트 구성 (MXH932): 사용자 필요에 따라 x16 1개, x8 2개, x4 4개 포트로 가변 구성 가능
시스템 확장성: MXS924와 결합하여 대규모 I/O 확장 시스템(I/O Expansion Systems) 구축 및 스케일링 지원
하드웨어 및 신뢰성: LP(Low Profile) 폼팩터, 클럭 격리(Clock Isolation) 및 CFC/SSC 자동 지원, 전면 상태 LED 및 커스텀용 EEPROM 내장

products.name: PXH830 PCIe NTB Adapter
features: 인터페이스 및 성능: PCIe Gen3(8.0 Gbps/lane) 지원 및 하위 호환(Gen1~3), RDMA(PIO 및 DMA) 지원
유연한 포트 구성: 4개의 x4 Gen3 케이블 포트를 탑재하여 사용자 필요에 따라 1x16 또는 2x8 포트로 유연하게 구성 가능
연결성: SFF-8644(iPass+ HD / MiniSAS-HD®) 커넥터 기반, 구리(Copper) 및 광(Fiber-optic) 케이블 모두 지원
브릿징 및 기술: 최대 2개의 NTB(Non-transparent bridging) 포트 지원, 호스트 클럭 격리(Full host clock isolation) 및 CFC/SSC 동시 지원
하드웨어 설계: LP(Low Profile) 폼팩터, 전면 링크 상태 LED, 사용자 맞춤 설정을 위한 EEPROM 내장

products.name: MXS924 PCIe 4.0 Switch
features: 성능 및 규격: PCIe 4.0(16 GT/s) 지원 및 하위 호환(Gen 1~4), 고성능 Microchip PFX Gen4 칩셋 탑재
포트 및 연결성: 총 24개의 PCIe 4.0 x4 포트(SFF-8644 커넥터) 제공, 구리 및 광케이블 지원, 유지보수가 용이한 핫플러그(Hot-plug) 지원
시스템 관리: 이더넷(Ethernet) 기반의 원격 관리 및 모니터링 기능, 전면 패널의 상태 LED를 통한 직관적인 포트 확인
하드웨어 설계: 표준 19인치 1U 랙마운트 섀시 적용, 다중 스위치 구성을 통한 유연한 확장성(Scalable) 제공
